creator: devel@stasyan.com
text:
> Please convert PYTHON_SITELIBDIR to PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX too as you do
> for py-qt4-svg.
Done.

> RUN_DEPENDS:= ${BUILD_DEPENDS}
This is required indeed.

> Would you please check if your port
> supports python3 and correct that line accordingly.
math/numpy required python 2.7, so building of science/veusz will be  
started with ptyhon 2.7 anyway.
USE_PYTHON=yes will be enough.

New patch in attachement.
